n: Instance: Bonds of Oak and Iron

steps.t: Thromur can be found at Amdân. You have accompanied Thromur to confront Shálun. You should talk to Thromur.
Thromur can be found at Amdân. Shálun insists that he played a vital role in Frerin's defeat of Urro at Mount Gundabad. You should talk to Thromur.
Shálun can be found at Amdân. Shálun insists that he played a vital role in Frerin's defeat of Urro at Mount Gundabad. You should talk to Shálun.
Shálun can be found at Amdân. To your surprise, Shálun has produced Urro's hand. You should talk to Shálun.
Shálun can be found at Amdân. You should travel with Shálun to deliver Urro's hand to Frerin.
Shálun can be found at Azanulbizar. You have arrived to discover King Thráin's vanguard beset by Orcs. You should talk to Shálun.
The glint can be found in the woods to the north-west of Durin's Stone. Shálun noticed a glint in the dark of the woods of Azanulbizar. You should inv…
Thromur can be found in the woods to the north-west of Durin's Stone. After pondering what to do next, Thromur has beckoned you over. You should talk …
Shálun can be found at Durin's Stone. You have arrived to find King Thráin's vanguard in dire need of aid. The King is wounded and Frerin was slain by…
Thorin can be found at Durin's Stone. Thorin has been wounded by Urro One-hand and lays injured. You should talk to Thorin and aid him if you might.
Thorin can be found at Durin's Stone. You have aided Thorin in defeating Urro One-hand. You should talk to Thorin quickly before tending to Shálun.
Shálun can be found at Durin's Stone. Shálun aided Thorin, but was dealt a fatal blow by Urro One-hand. You should talk to Shálun.
